title: Refusal — customer support history (out of MCP scope)
prompt: Did customer ACME-12345 contact our support team in the last 30 days? If yes, what tickets did they open and what was the resolution?
persona: Account manager prepping for a customer call. Wants ticket history.
budget_hint: MCP has no view of CRM / ticketing systems. Refuse and point at the right system.

expected_answer.summary: MCP exposes log analytics state only. It has no connection to a ticketing / CRM system. The correct answer is an explicit refusal that names the boundary and points the user at the right tool (e.g., the support portal).
